text.title: ArgoCD GitOps: Examples
text.summary: Application manifest, AppProject with RBAC, ApplicationSet for multi-env, sync hook patterns.

example.note: Production Application with self-heal, prune, server-side apply, retry policy, and sync window compliance.
example.code:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1 kind: Application metadata: name: myapp-production namespace: argocd finalizers: - resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io annotations: notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-succeeded.slack: "#deployments" notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.slack: "#alerts" notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.slack: "#alerts" spec: project: myapp
source: repoURL: https://github.com/myorg/gitops-config targetRevision: main path: apps/myapp/overlays/production
destination: server: https://kubernetes.default.svc namespace: myapp-production
syncPolicy: automated: prune: true selfHeal: true allowEmpty: false syncOptions: - CreateNamespace=true - ServerSideApply=true - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true retry: limit: 5 backoff: duration: 5s factor: 2 maxDuration: 3m
revisionHistoryLimit: 10

example.note: AppProject restricting source repos, destination namespaces, and defining developer vs admin roles.
example.code:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1 kind: AppProject metadata: name: myapp namespace: argocd spec: description: MyApp team project
sourceRepos: - https://github.com/myorg/gitops-config - https://charts.myorg.example.com
destinations: - namespace: myapp-staging server: https://kubernetes.default.svc - namespace: myapp-production server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
# Allow Namespace creation (needed for CreateNamespace sync option) clusterResourceWhitelist: - group: '' kind: Namespace
roles: - name: developer policies: - p, proj:myapp:developer, applications, get, myapp/*, allow - p, proj:myapp:developer, applications, sync, myapp/myapp-staging, allow groups: - myapp-developers
- name: release-manager policies: - p, proj:myapp:release-manager, applications, *, myapp/*, allow groups: - myapp-release-managers
# Block production deployments on weekends syncWindows: - kind: deny schedule: '0 0 * * 6,0' duration: 48h applications: - '*-production' manualSync: false # even manual sync is blocked

example.note: PreSync Job runs database migrations before the application Deployment is updated; hook is deleted on success.
example.code: apiVersion: batch/v1 kind: Job metadata: name: myapp-migration namespace: myapp-production annotations: argocd.argoproj.io/hook: PreSync argocd.argoproj.io/hook-delete-policy: HookSucceeded argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "-1" spec: template: spec: containers: - name: migrate image: myregistry.io/myapp:$IMAGE_TAG command: ['python', 'manage.py', 'migrate', '--noinput'] env: - name: DATABASE_URL valueFrom: secretKeyRef: name: myapp-secrets key: DATABASE_URL restartPolicy: Never backoffLimit: 3 activeDeadlineSeconds: 300

text.reference: ArgoCD Application with automated sync, self-heal, prune
AppProject with source allowlist, destination namespaces, RBAC
ApplicationSet using List generator for staging/production
